description_long: This object is a rectangular book with a pixelated, abstract cover design featuring a prominent red and blue shape in the center, surrounded by a mix of beige, green, and black blocks. The front cover is visually striking, with a digital or retro video game aesthetic, and the background is a light, creamy color with scattered pixel patterns. The back cover is plain, composed of horizontal beige blocks resembling a simplified wood or brick pattern. The spine is very thin and light-colored, with no visible text or decoration. The book appears to be of standard thickness, suggesting it is a paperback or softcover edition. The overall appearance is modern and artistic, likely appealing to fans of digital art or contemporary design.
description: A rectangular book with a pixelated, abstract red and blue cover design and a plain beige back cover, featuring a thin, undecorated spine.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a pixelated, abstract red and blue design on a light background with scattered colored blocks.
description_view_1: The spine is extremely thin, light beige, and lacks any visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain, featuring horizontal beige blocks in a simple, grid-like pattern.
description_view_3: Another view of the thin, undecorated spine, similar to view 1.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a pixelated, abstract illustration with a central red and blue shape, surrounded by scattered blocks of beige, green, and black. The style is reminiscent of retro video game graphics, giving the cover a digital, modern feel.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is not decorated and is a plain light beige color with no visible text or patterns.
